description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in traditional East Asian attire, featuring a voluminous outer robe with wide sleeves and layered fabric. The robe is primarily composed of two contrasting sections: one side is a muted reddish-brown, while the other is a light gray, both with a soft, fabric-like texture. The figure is bald, with a neutral facial expression and naturalistic human proportions. The hands are visible, with fingers slightly splayed, and the feet are clad in simple, flat footwear resembling traditional sandals. The overall appearance suggests a calm, composed pedestrian, possibly a monk or someone in ceremonial dress, suitable for urban or cultural environments.
description: An adult figure in traditional layered robes with wide sleeves, bald head, and simple sandals, evoking a calm, ceremonial presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, both arms extended, and the layered robe with contrasting reddish-brown and gray sections.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the drape of the reddish-brown robe, and the wide sleeve.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the full expanse of the reddish-brown robe, and both sleeves from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the drape of the gray robe, and the right arm extended forward.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional wide-sleeved robe with layered draping
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
